item.title: Penguin - LEGO NINJAGO Choose Your Ninja Mission: With NINJAGO Jay minifigure
item.description: There’s a deal Penguin - LEGO NINJAGO Choose Your Ninja Mission: With NINJAGO Jay minifigure here: ℹ️: 🛒 Buy it now!!
